traits.original: Gurú de las finanzas - Puede usar monedas para timbear un nuevo tiro de dados, especulando que le saldrá mejor esta vez

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: For the first 3 rounds, face 5 receives a +10 percentage-point dice bias.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Uses the current round duration and diceBias effect.

traits.original: Falso abstemio - Cada vez que le toca tomar alcohol debe pagar con sus monedas, el precio de ser desleal a sus principios

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: False abstemious: take one shot at the start of each of the first 2 turns.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Uses the onTurnStart effect hook so the action appears before the roll.

traits.source_original: Abstemio - Cada vez que le toca tomar alcohol debe pagar con sus monedas, el precio de ser desleal a sus principios

traits.original: Rugby - Si tiene un jugador directamente atrás, puede pasarle la ovalada (una penalidad o castigo que le haya tocado) a dicho jugador

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: The first time Willy rolls 1, the nearest player behind him loses 3 coins.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Uses a nearest-behind target and expires after the first trigger.

traits.original: Larpi - Si saca 6, el próximo turno avanza la mitad (o redondeado para abajo en impares, 0 si saca 1) de lo que salga en los dados. Está en Pilar y no puede asistir

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: If Willy's last 2 rolls total more than 10, his next turn has 0.5x movement rounded down.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Uses rollTotal and applies a one-turn movement effect.

traits.original: Si saca 5 cinco veces seguidas, gana el juego

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: After five exact consecutive 5s, face 5 receives a +5 percentage-point dice bias for the next 3 rolls.
proposed_adaptation.reason: The streak grants a bounded bonus and never ends the match.

traits.original: Desempleo - Objetos en la tienda le salen 20% menos, consecuencia de no tener gastos fijos

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: Whenever Nico rolls 1, he gains 1 coin.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Replaces the intentionally omitted per-player shop discount.

traits.original: Frustración - Si sale anteúltimo en un juego, o empata por el último puesto, pasa a ser último. Tristeza nao tem fin

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: If Nico finishes outside the top 3 in a minigame, he gains 1 extra coin.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Uses the trait owner's resolved ranking position.

traits.original: Dormir en clase sin que le digan nada - Una vez por cada número de dado (ej: si le toca 1 solo una vez puede usarlo en 1, una vez en 2 etc) puede elegir saltear su turno y no avanzar lo que marquen los dados

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: For Facu's first 3 turns, face 6 receives a +5 percentage-point dice bias.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Replaces face-specific skip inventory with a bounded passive bonus.

traits.original: Ubuntu - Los juegos no están para Linux, se queda sin jugar un minijuego si la mesa define que linux no tiene soporte para él

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: Facu still plays minigames, but loses 3 coins after each scored minigame he participates in.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Prompts are excluded and no player is removed from an activity.

traits.original: Home office - Al no tener que viajar nunca, está descansado: Si saca 1 en los dados puede optar por tirar de nuevo y moverse la cantidad sacada sumado a 1 (ej: 1 + 4 = 5)

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: When FranG rolls 1, move +2 and give face 5 a +5 percentage-point bias on the next roll.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Replaces rerolling with current movement and dice-bias primitives.

traits.original: Excusa - Si cae en un casillero con dos o más jugadores, pierde 2 turnos. Se congeló pensando una excusa para no asistir

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: If FranG finishes outside the top 3 in a minigame, he gains 1 extra coin.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Replaces the removed tile-occupancy query with a ranking result condition.

traits.original: Europa universalis IV - Si cae a un casillero con otro jugador en él,  puede desafiarlo a un duelo de historia: Otro jugador le muestra una bandera de un país de su elección, el que adivina gana x cantidad de monedas del otro jugador

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: Beltro can trigger a dedicated Europa Universalis IV Buzzer event with a 3-coin loser-to-winner transfer.
proposed_adaptation.reason: The current player-specific event trigger replaces tile occupancy.

traits.original: Zona punga - Si cae por primera vez en un barrio peligroso como Belgrano, Nuñez o Recoleta, pierde un turno. El miedo lo paraliza

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: If Beltro finishes outside the top 3 in a minigame, he loses 1 coin.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Replaces dangerous-neighborhood entry memory with a ranking result condition.

traits.original: Aparición repentina - Si está detrás de TODOS los jugadores en el tablero, puede gastar su turno en aparecer en el casillero (n+1) delante de ellos. No esperaban encontrarlo ahí.

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: Gastón starts with Mochila de Gastón active for the first 2 rounds, moving at 0.5x speed.
proposed_adaptation.reason: The starting trait applies the artifact's timed movement effect immediately.

traits.original: Malas decisiones - Si cae en su posesión el bolso de Ikea, pierde todas sus monedas. Pago para sacarse el peso de encima

proposed_adaptation.current_best_fit: While the starting backpack is active, rolling 6 makes Gastón take one shot.
proposed_adaptation.reason: Keeps the backpack downside without artifact-possession triggers.

implementation_proposals.title: Bias the die; react to the result
implementation_proposals.description: Use diceBias for bounded roll changes, rollTotal or exact consecutiveRolls for dice history, and rankingPosition conditions for activity-result traits.

implementation_proposals.title: Five 5s grant a 5% bias—not a win
implementation_proposals.description: Willy never ends the match. Five exact rolls of 5 grant +5 percentage points on face 5 for the next 3 rolls.

implementation_proposals.title: Everyone plays; penalties resolve afterward
implementation_proposals.description: Everyone remains in the minigame. Character traits can add a coin reward or penalty after the result and prompts can be excluded.

implementation_proposals.title: Use fixed moves or a chosen player position
implementation_proposals.description: Story effects may move a player forward or backward by a fixed number of cells. For player-position effects, let the host choose a player and resolve moveToPlayerPosition. Do not infer proximity, social relationships, ages, appearance, landmarks, or board occupancy.

implementation_proposals.title: Keep prices and rankings global
implementation_proposals.description: Prices and rankings stay global. Nico's unemployment becomes a roll-based coin reward, while Frustración reacts to finishing outside the top 3 without rewriting the ranking.

implementation_proposals.title: Make board jokes explicit prompts
implementation_proposals.description: Occupancy and first-entry memory remain omitted. Those jokes now use explicit roll totals, minigame ranking conditions, or character-specific events.

implementation_proposals.title: Artifacts resolve when used
implementation_proposals.description: Artifacts still resolve on use. Gastón's starting backpack is represented by two round-limited default trait effects using the same movement and shot behavior.

extraction_notes: Every event caption is retained separately from its source effect text.
Captions with multiple images are duplicated with distinct event IDs and a shared source_caption_group_id.
Trivia question 4 and its image-based answers are intentionally omitted.
The first image in the Eventos section has no adjacent caption; it is retained as an unassigned source image rather than guessed onto an event.
Implementation gaps were replaced with scoped adaptation proposals on 2026-07-10; omitted mechanics are intentional, not errors.
